For rent is a very well maintained Upper Rockridge 1920s Craftsman style home - with significant updates on a clean classic style. 

The house has 3 bedrooms, 1 full bath and 2 split bathrooms, big dining room, kitchen, living room (with wood burning fireplace), washer and dryer. There is also about 700 sq feet on the lowest level that is unwarranted, which could possibly be used for storage or an office. House includes 1 car parking garage, and landscaped front and back and yards. Some special features include: double-paned windows, custom blinds, A/C and hardware floors throughout the 2 main floors.

We have recently put a lot of time and effort into fixing up the house. This includes: a new roof, a new paint job (both inside and out), a beautiful stone walkway to the front door, refinished original doors, and landscaping to be completed soon.

We are looking for renters who are interested in living in our home, and taking into consideration how much we love and care for it. It's a single-family home, which means there more to take care of than condo-living, etc. We have a gardener set up, but do appreciate when our tenants take care of the house and let us know when something is wrong, after troubleshooting. A lot of TLC has been put into the house since out last tenants. Everything has been painted, we redid the backyard and put in a new garage floor. 

One of best parts about this house is the location. In the perfect part of Rockridge! Located in a very family-friendly neighborhood, this house is close to everything.
